title: ononis natrix subsp. falcata
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. falcata, also known as the falcataria spiny restharrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing joint pain and swelling, and may help to protect against certain diseases due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The falcataria spiny restharrow can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
